name: Jelly Christmas Eyes
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 20 minutes Chilling time: 30 minutes Baking time: 10 to 12 minutes per batch
1. Cream margarine and sugar in a mixing bowl until smooth. Add egg, lemon juice, and lemon rind. Mix until combined. Gradually add flour and nuts, wrapping the dough in plastic wrap. Flatten and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Roll out chilled dough on a lightly floured surface to an 1/8-inch thickness. Cut out circles using a 2-inch cookie cutter. From half of the circles, cut smaller inner circles with another cutter.
3. Place the whole circles and rings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden. Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
4. Spread a small amount of jelly onto each whole circle. Press an inverted ring onto each jelly-covered circle. Dust the cookies lightly with confectioners' sugar or granulated sugar to coat evenly. Store in an airtight container.
